prediction.reasoning: Based on historical volatility analysis of GOOGL, the stock exhibits annualized volatility of approximately 25-30%. For a 20-day period, this translates to expected daily moves of ~1.6-1.9%. The point estimate assumes slight upward momentum given tech sector fundamentals. Confidence intervals are calculated using Monte Carlo simulation assuming log-normal distribution with current volatility parameters, accounting for both systematic and idiosyncratic risks over the 20-day horizon.
